prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

args.command:
cat <<'EOF' > tagline.txt
Brighten every workday with light that knows you.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > hero-copy.txt
Headline: Lumina—Your Workday, in Perfect Light

Paragraph 1: Remote work demands a rhythm of focus, rest, and creativity. Lumina keeps pace by intuitively adjusting color temperature and brightness to match your schedule, calendar cues, and the natural light around you.
Paragraph 2: From sunrise-ready warmth for gentle wake ups to crisp, cool beams for productive afternoons, Lumina transforms your desk into a sanctuary of clarity without you lifting a finger.
Paragraph 3: Plug in Lumina, sync your calendar, and let luminous comfort guide every task, call, and idea with effortless, automated brilliance.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > email-sequence.txt
Email 1 Subject: Meet Lumina—Light That Works With You

Body:
Hey [Name],

You spend the day jumping between meetings, deep work, and mental breaks. What if your desk light could keep up? Introducing Lumina, a smart desk lamp engineered for remote workers who need light that adapts to every beat of the day.

Lumina senses your room’s ambient glow, honors your calendar, and automatically shifts color temperature and brightness so you never wrestle with settings mid-focus. It’s $149 of intelligent illumination, built for simplicity and designed to elevate your home office.

Stay tuned—tomorrow we’ll reveal how Lumina protects your focus AND supports your wellness.

Best,
The Lumina Team

---

Email 2 Subject: See How Lumina Guides Your Energy Through the Day

Body:
Hey [Name],

Remember adjusting your desk lamp every time the sun shifted or you hit a stretch of Zoom calls? Lumina does that for you. In the morning it bathes your space in warm, grounding light; mid-afternoon it switches to bright, blue-white clarity that keeps you alert.

It syncs with your calendar to soften light during calls and brighten back up during sprints, all while responding to the room around it. You can even set lighting moods for deep focus, creative work, or relaxing wrap-ups.

We’re stocking Lumina soon—reserve yours before it sells out and be among the first to bring effortless light into your workday.

Warmly,
The Lumina Team

---

Email 3 Subject: Launch Day—Lumina Is Live!

Body:
Hey [Name],

Lumina is officially here. Your smarter desk companion is ready to keep you centered with adaptive light that matches your schedule, environment, and energy.

Order now for $149 and get fast, confident shipping straight to your workspace. Plug in, sync to your apps, and feel the difference an intelligent lamp makes for your productivity, mood, and wellbeing.

Welcome to the glow—lumina.com

Cheers,
The Lumina Team
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > social-posts.txt
Twitter/X:
1. "Tired of chasing the perfect desk light? Meet Lumina. It adjusts color temperature and brightness based on your calendar, the time of day, and ambient room glow. Just plug it in and let smart light guide your focus. #Productivity #RemoteWork #LuminaLight"
2. "Newsflash: your desk lamp should work as hard as you do. Lumina auto-tunes brightness for every mood, meeting, and deep work sprint so you stay in flow. Launching soon for $149. Stay tuned. #SmartHome #RemoteWorkLife"

Instagram:
1. "Swipe to see Lumina transform from warm sunrise vibes to bright midday focus. Remote work deserves lighting that adapts, not distracts. 🌅💡 #LuminaLight #HomeOfficeGoals #SmartDeskLamp"
2. "Lumina syncs with your calendar and senses room lighting to deliver the right glow on the right day. Tag a coworker who needs a smarter desk setup. ✨ #WorkspaceInspo #RemoteWorker #DeskEssentials"

LinkedIn:
1. "Remote professionals, imagine not touching your desk lamp again. Lumina matches its light to your calendar, the time of day, and your environment, so you stay focused across every task. Launching now at $149. #RemoteWork #WorkplaceWellness #LuminaLight"
2. "Your workspace influences your performance. Lumina adjusts lighting to support energy, clarity, and calm through every call, sprint, and creative break. Discover the adaptive desk lamp built for remote teams. #Leadership #WFHTips #SmartLighting"
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > landing-page.txt
Hero:
Headline: Lumina—Work in Light That Understands You
Subheadline: Auto-adjusting color temperature and brightness tailored to your day, calendar, and surroundings.
CTA: Pre-order Now for $149

Introduction:
Lumina is a smart desk lamp built for remote workers who demand more from their workspace lighting. It harmonizes your routine with intelligent, effortless illumination.

Features:
1. Adaptive Daylight Curve: Lumina senses the time of day and shifts from warm sunrise tones to cool focus hues so you stay energized and balanced.
2. Calendar Sync: Lumina softens light during calls and brightens for blocks of focus. Link your calendar and let Lumina intuitively respond to your meetings, sprints, and breaks.
3. Ambient Light Awareness: No need for manual adjustments—Lumina reacts to real-time room brightness, keeping every desk evenly lit no matter the weather.
4. Wellness Modes: Choose presets for deep work, creative flow, or recharge, and let Lumina lead your energy with gentle fades and brightness curves.
5. Sleek Design, Smart Control: Minimal footprint, whisper-quiet operation, and easy app control keep your desk looking clean and feeling intentional.

Testimonials Placeholder:
"Lumina transformed my home office—no more eye strain and my focus is sharper than ever." — [Name], Productive Designer
"We sync Lumina with our editorial calendar. The light cues help our team stay calm yet responsive throughout the day." — [Name], Remote Team Lead

FAQ:
1. How does Lumina know when to change color temperature?
Lumina tracks time of day, your synced calendar events, and ambient room light to make adjustments automatically. It also learns preferences over time.
2. What platforms does Lumina integrate with?
Lumina works with Google Calendar, Outlook, and Apple Calendar, with more integrations on the roadmap.
3. Can I manually set brightness or color?
Yes. Use the Lumina app to tweak minute details, lock in a favorite lighting mood, or override the automation anytime.
4. Is Lumina compatible with smart home ecosystems?
Lumina connects via Wi-Fi and supports future firmware updates for broader ecosystem compatibility.
5. What’s included with the $149 purchase?
Every Lumina ships with the lamp, a premium magnetic base, power adapter, and guided setup instructions.

CTA Section:
Ready to work in the right light? Pre-order Lumina today for $149 and let intelligent illumination guide every task.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > press-release.txt
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Remote Workers’ Days

Dateline: October 2024 — SAN FRANCISCO

Body:
San Francisco, October 2024 — Remote workers spend long hours in front of their screens, yet their lighting rarely keeps pace with the demands of their day. Lumina, a new smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting, officially launches today at $149.

“Remote work deserves intuitive technology that supports productivity without distraction,” said Alex Rivera, Lumina’s founder. “Lumina blends adaptive lighting with calendar and environmental awareness so professionals can stay in a focused, healthy rhythm without ever touching a dial.”

Lumina transitions from warm, grounding light for morning routines to crisp, focused beams in the afternoon. Calendar sync allows the lamp to dim during video calls, brighten during deep work sprints, and gently shift into lower, relaxing hues as the day winds down. Built-in sensors continuously read the room’s environment, ensuring consistent light whether it’s dawn or a dim evening.

Designed with premium materials and a sleek profile, Lumina also offers wellness modes for creative focus, mindful breaks, and energy resets. The companion app provides manual overrides, custom scenes, and simple integration with Google Calendar, Outlook, and Apple Calendar.

Lumina is available now for pre-order at lumina.com and will begin shipping in early November.

Boilerplate:
Lumina is a San Francisco-based smart lighting company creating intuitive desk lamps for modern remote workers. The company designs hardware and software that keeps workspaces comfortable, productive, and beautifully lit. For more information, visit lumina.com.
EOF

steps.text:
I’ve created and saved all the requested campaign materials for the Lumina launch:

- **tagline.txt:** Crafted a memorable brand tagline.
- **hero-copy.txt:** Delivered a landing-page hero headline plus supporting paragraphs.
- **email-sequence.txt:** Provided a three-email launch series with subject lines and full bodies.
- **social-posts.txt:** Wrote two posts each for Twitter/X, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
- **landing-page.txt:** Completed full landing-page copy covering hero, features, testimonials placeholders, FAQ, and CTA.
- **press-release.txt:** Drafted a complete launch-day press release in standard format.

Let me know if you’d like any revisions or additional assets!

artifacts.brand-guide.md:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features
